---
title: ""
page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<section class="hero-section">
  <div class="hero-content">
    <div class="hero-avatar">
      <img src="assets/profile.jpg" alt="Mo Boroumand" class="profile-photo"
           onerror="this.src='https://via.placeholder.com/160x160/1a237e/ffffff?text=MB'">
    </div>
    <div class="hero-text">
      <h1 class="hero-name">Mo Boroumand</h1>
      <p class="hero-tagline">Product Manager · Platform & Integration · UCSD MSBA '26</p>
      <p class="hero-bio">
        Platform-focused product leader with 18+ years of experience building and scaling
        integration frameworks, data pipelines, API ecosystems, and shared services infrastructure.
        Based in San Diego, CA.
      </p>
      <div class="hero-cta">
        <a href="about.qmd" class="btn btn-primary">About Me</a>
        <a href="resume.qmd" class="btn btn-outline">View Resume</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section class="highlights-section">
  <div class="highlights-grid">
    <div class="highlight-card">
      <div class="card-icon">🚀</div>
      <h3>Startup Ideas</h3>
      <p>Ideas and ventures I've been building or exploring — from EV platforms to cloud services.</p>
      <a href="startup.qmd">Learn more →</a>
    </div>
    <div class="highlight-card">
      <div class="card-icon">🛠️</div>
      <h3>Products</h3>
      <p>Things I've shipped — cloud infrastructure, CRM platforms, and data pipelines.</p>
      <a href="products.qmd">Learn more →</a>
    </div>
    <div class="highlight-card">
      <div class="card-icon">💼</div>
      <h3>Experience</h3>
      <p>18+ years of building and leading — from a regional ISP to a San Diego tech company.</p>
      <a href="experience.qmd">Learn more →</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>
```
